My Inventory

Cards I own but haven't listed yet. Each row is an eBay-ready draft — title, category, suggested price, and item specifics derived from your SCP export. Click Show listing info to copy a formatted block, or Draft on eBay → to create a real draft listing (Phase 2 — requires image upload + Lambda /ebay/create-listing route).
